treatment_information.specific_treatment: Decreasing bath temperature and changing washing method
treatment_information.dosage_or_details: Water temperature lowered to less than 34°C, showering instead of bathing
treatment_information.treatment_response: Effective in preventing seizures; one additional seizure occurred at age 14 months
No further seizures during bathing after treatment initiation; treatment discontinued at 18 months with no recurrence

treatment_timeline.event: First episodes of seizures during warm bath
Diagnosis confirmed by video-EEG monitoring during bathing
Treatment started with decreased bath temperature and changed washing method
Video-EEG monitoring during bathing confirmed diagnosis for Patient 2
One additional seizure occurred in Patient 1

patient_outcome.final_status: Normal psychomotor development, no further seizures after treatment adjustments
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Favorable; benign form of epilepsy with normal development
